name: Workiva Inc.
description: Workiva Inc. is a global software-as-a-service (SaaS) company that provides a cloud-based, AI-powered platform for integrated reporting and compliance. The company enables organizations to connect data across finance, risk, sustainability, and legal departments, facilitating automated, traceable, and secure reporting. By centralizing data and workflows, Workiva helps businesses streamline complex processes such as financial close, SEC reporting, ESG disclosures, and internal audit management. Headquartered in Ames, Iowa, Workiva serves a diverse range of public and private companies, government agencies, and higher-education institutions worldwide, focusing on enhancing transparency, accuracy, and efficiency in high-stakes corporate reporting.
